# Venom Multispecialty Hospital

> Venom Multispecialty Hospital is a patient-first, affordable multispecialty hospital in Pune, Maharashtra, India, offering 12+ departments, 40+ doctors and 24x7 emergency and ambulance care.

Venom Multispecialty Hospital provides outpatient consultations, inpatient care, diagnostics and 24x7 emergency services across Cardiology, Orthopedics, Pediatrics, Neurology, Gynecology, ENT, Dermatology and General Medicine. OPD hours are Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM–8:00 PM; the emergency department and ambulance service operate every day, all day.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://venomhospital.netlify.app/): Overview of the hospital, highlights and emergency care information.
- [About](https://venomhospital.netlify.app/about.html): Hospital story, mission, values and frequently asked questions.
- [Departments](https://venomhospital.netlify.app/departments.html): List of medical departments and services offered.
- [Doctors](https://venomhospital.netlify.app/doctors.html): Doctor profiles, specializations and consultation fees.
- [Gallery](https://venomhospital.netlify.app/gallery.html): Photos of hospital facilities, equipment and emergency services.
- [Appointment](https://venomhospital.netlify.app/appointment.html): Online appointment booking form.
- [Contact](https://venomhospital.netlify.app/contact.html): Address, phone numbers, email and visiting hours.

## Contact

- Address: MG Road, Pune, Maharashtra - 411001, India
- Phone: +91-9876543210
- Emergency Helpline: +91-9876500000
- Email: info@venomhospital.com

## Notes

This site is a static, informational hospital website. All doctor names, fees and some contact details are placeholders for a student/demo project and should be verified directly with the hospital before being treated as authoritative.
